title: The BanHammer
description: A banhammer for server when you hit a player it insta bans then forever!
body:
Take moderation into your own hands literally.

This mod adds a powerful BanHammer that instantly and permanently bans any player you strike with it. No commands, no menus, just one swing and they’re gone forever.

Perfect for server admins who want a fast, dramatic, and satisfying way to deal with rule breakers.

Features:
- 🔨 One-hit permanent ban
- ⚡ Instant effect on player hit
- 🧵 Designed for Fabric 1.21.1
- 🛠️ Simple and lightweight
